description:
responsibility:
- responsible for handling the input data for the MapReduce job
- responsible for creating splits for the input data
- responsible for creating RecordReaders for each split

collaboration:
- CombineFileInputFormat collaborates with CombineFileSplit and FileInputFormat to create splits for the input data
- CombineFileRecordReader collaborates with CombineFileSplit and TaskAttemptContext to read the input data
- CombineFileRecordReaderWrapper collaborates with FileInputFormat, CombineFileSplit, TaskAttemptContext, and RecordReader to read the input data
- DelegatingInputFormat collaborates with MultipleInputs to handle the input data for the MapReduce job
- DelegatingRecordReader collaborates with TaggedInputSplit and TaskAttemptContext to read the input data
- FixedLengthInputFormat collaborates with FixedLengthRecordReader to read fixed-length records from the input data
- FixedLengthRecordReader collaborates with Configuration, Path, FSDataInputStream, Seekable, CompressionCodec, CompressionInputStream, and Decompressor to read fixed-length records from the input data
- KeyValueLineRecordReader collaborates with LineRecordReader to read key-value pairs from the input data
- KeyValueTextInputFormat collaborates with KeyValueLineRecordReader to read key-value pairs from the input data
- LineRecordReader collaborates with InputSplit, TaskAttemptContext, Configuration, FSDataInputStream, FutureDataInputStreamBuilder, Path, Seekable, LongWritable, Text, CompressionCodecPool, CompressionCodec, SplitCompressionInputStream, SplittableCompressionCodec, CompressionCodecFactory, Decompressor, FutureIO, Logger, and LoggerFactory to read the input data
- NLineInputFormat collaborates with LineRecordReader to read the input data
- SequenceFileAsTextRecordReader collaborates with SequenceFileRecordReader to read key-value pairs from the input data
- SequenceFileInputFormat collaborates with SequenceFileRecordReader to read key-value pairs from the input data
- SequenceFileRecordReader collaborates with Configuration and SequenceFile.Reader to read key-value pairs from the input data
- TextInputFormat collaborates with LineRecordReader to read the input data

architectural role/pattern:
- the directory acts as a factory for creating RecordReaders for each split
- the directory follows the decorator pattern by wrapping a RecordReader to handle a single file split
- the directory follows the factory pattern by creating RecordReaders for each split
- the directory follows the strategy pattern by using different RecordReaders for different types of input data
- the directory follows the facade pattern by providing a single interface for handling different types of input data
- the directory follows the adapter pattern by converting the input keys and values to their String forms
- the directory follows the singleton pattern by providing a single instance of the RecordReader for each split
